privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: This policy explains how Pestify (Pest - Free) processes personal data on pestify.gr and the Pestify application.
privacy.provided_by: This Privacy Policy is provided by
privacy.aim: We aim to comply with Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR) and applicable Greek data protection law.
privacy.note_login: Note: The "Login" button on pestify.gr only redirects you to app.pestify.gr. No authentication occurs on pestify.gr.
privacy.data_collect_desc: We collect personal data only when you voluntarily submit it
privacy.form: name, email, company, team size, message
privacy.contact: name and email (as requested by Calendly)
privacy.name: (Christos Pamporis), Greece
privacy.purpose_desc: We use this information strictly to
privacy.communicate_demo: Communicate with you about a demo you requested
privacy.no_sell: We do not sell personal data
privacy.no_advertising: We do not use your data for advertising, remarketing, or profiling
privacy.no_payments: We do not run transactions or process payments on pestify.gr
privacy.no_newsletter: We do not create a marketing database for newsletters without your explicit consent
privacy.legal_basis_desc: We process this data under GDPR Article 6(1)(b) (steps prior to entering into a contract, at your request) and/or Article 6(1)(f) (legitimate interest in responding to business inquiries).
privacy.retention_desc: We retain inquiry and demo-related communications only for as long as necessary to respond and follow up on your request, and then delete them when no longer needed, unless legal obligations require longer retention.
privacy.calendly_desc: If you request a demo using Calendly, your booking details may be processed by Calendly. Calendly may act as an independent data controller for certain processing activities according to its own privacy policy. We recommend reviewing Calendly's privacy information before submitting data through the Calendly interface.
privacy.app_data_desc: When the application is used, the platform may process and store data such as
privacy.service_locations_desc: address of the location where pest control services are performed
privacy.operational_data_desc: service logs, reports, performance indicators (used only inside the app)
privacy.technician_data_desc: technician name and age (used only for internal operational management)
privacy.images_desc: admin uploads images created by the admin (top-view diagrams of buildings / locations)
privacy.no_payment_data: No payment data is processed. No transactions take place through the platform.
privacy.gdpr_roles_desc: When pest control companies use Pestify and upload personal data of private individuals (e.g., homeowner names), the pest control company is typically the
privacy.data_processor_desc: for that customer's data, processing it only to provide the service.
privacy.processor_note: Where Pestify acts as a Data Processor on behalf of a business customer, requests regarding personal data (e.g., access, deletion) should primarily be directed to the relevant business acting as Data Controller. Pestify will assist the Controller as required under GDPR Article 28.
privacy.app_legal_basis_desc: For platform account operation and service delivery, processing is generally based on GDPR Article 6(1)(b) (performance of a contract) and GDPR Article 28 (processing on behalf of a controller, where applicable).
privacy.security_1: Passwords are stored using hashing (not plaintext)
privacy.app_retention_desc: Application data is retained for the duration of the contractual relationship with the business customer and is deleted upon account termination or upon instruction from the business customer, unless legal obligations require longer retention.
privacy.papaki_desc: Papaki may process limited technical data (e.g., IP addresses) as part of standard hosting operations.
privacy.app_hosting_desc: The application backend is hosted on
privacy.no_sell_data: We do not sell, rent, or trade personal data.
privacy.data_processed_by: Data may be processed only by
privacy.hosting_providers: Our hosting/infrastructure providers (Papaki for the website; Railway for the backend and database)
privacy.calendly_processor: Calendly (for demo scheduling, when you use the demo booking feature)
privacy.authorized_personnel: Authorized personnel, solely for support and operations
privacy.international_transfers_desc: Where any service provider involved in processing transfers personal data outside the European Economic Area (EEA), appropriate safeguards (such as Standard Contractual Clauses) will be used where required in accordance with GDPR Chapter V.
privacy.cookies_desc: At the time of this policy, pestify.gr does not use analytics or marketing cookies. If analytics/advertising tools are enabled in the future, they will be activated only with user consent where required, and this policy will be updated.
privacy.app_cookies: The application may use strictly necessary cookies (or similar technologies) for secure authentication and session management.
privacy.rights_list: Depending on the circumstances, you may have rights including
privacy.right_withdraw: Right to withdraw consent (where processing is based on consent)
privacy.complaint_right: You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the competent supervisory authority. For Greece, the supervisory authority is
privacy.policy_changes_desc: We may update this Privacy Policy to reflect changes in our services or legal requirements. We will publish the updated version on this page with a revised date.
privacy.app_policy_note: If the application provides its own dedicated Privacy Policy for in-app processing, it should be available within the app and/or on app.pestify.gr.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.subtitle: These Terms govern your access to and use of Pestify.
terms.body:
Terms of Use

Effective Date: 23/02/2026
Last Updated: 23/02/2026

These Terms of Use (“Terms”) govern your access to and use of:

  • pestify.gr (marketing website), and
  • app.pestify.gr and related mobile applications (the “Platform”),

operated by:

Pest – Free
Owner: Christos Pamporis (Χρήστος Παμπόρης)
Greece

By accessing or using Pestify, you agree to be bound by these Terms.

If you do not agree, you must not use the services.

1. Scope of the Services

Pestify is a digital software platform designed for pest control businesses to:

  • Manage customer data
  • Organize service schedules
  • Maintain service logs and documentation
  • Generate structured compliance reports
  • Improve operational workflows

The marketing website (pestify.gr) is informational only and does not provide pest control services.

2. Eligibility

The Platform is intended primarily for business users (B2B).

By using the Platform, you confirm that:

  • You are acting on behalf of a business entity, or
  • You are legally authorized to bind the business you represent

If you are a consumer within the meaning of EU consumer law, certain mandatory consumer protections may apply.

3. Account Registration

To access the Platform, you may need to create an account.

You agree to:

  • Provide accurate and complete information
  • Maintain confidentiality of login credentials
  • Be responsible for all activities under your account

You must notify us immediately of unauthorized use.

We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts in case of breach.

4. Subscription & Payments

If paid plans are offered:

  • Subscription fees are stated on the Pricing page.
  • Fees are exclusive of VAT unless stated otherwise.
  • Payment terms will be specified at checkout.
  • Failure to pay may result in suspension.

Free trials, if offered, convert to paid subscriptions unless cancelled before expiration.

5. Acceptable Use

You agree NOT to:

  • Use the Platform for unlawful purposes
  • Upload illegal or harmful content
  • Interfere with system security
  • Reverse engineer, copy, or exploit the software
  • Use the Platform to process data without legal basis under GDPR

You are solely responsible for the legality of the data you upload.

6. Intellectual Property

All intellectual property rights in:

  • Software
  • Code
  • Design
  • Branding
  • Documentation
  • Logos

are owned by Pest – Free unless otherwise stated.

You are granted a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to use the Platform for internal business purposes only.

You may not:

  • Resell the Platform
  • Modify or redistribute it
  • Create derivative works

7. Data Protection (GDPR Roles)

7.1 Marketing Website

For pestify.gr, Pest – Free acts as Data Controller as described in the Privacy Policy.

7.2 Application Platform

When business customers upload personal data (e.g., homeowner names):

  • The pest control company is the Data Controller
  • Pestify acts as a Data Processor under Article 28 GDPR

We process data solely:

  • On documented instructions from the business customer
  • To provide the contracted service

Requests from individuals (data subjects) should primarily be directed to the business acting as Controller.

A Data Processing Agreement (DPA) may apply where required by law.

8. Availability of Service

We aim to provide continuous access but do not guarantee uninterrupted availability.

The Platform may be temporarily unavailable due to:

  • Maintenance
  • Security updates
  • Technical failures
  • Force majeure events

We reserve the right to modify or discontinue features.

9. Limitation of Liability

To the maximum extent permitted under Greek and EU law:

  • The Platform is provided “as is”.
  • We do not guarantee error-free or uninterrupted service.
  • We are not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages.
  • Our total liability shall not exceed the amount paid by the customer in the preceding 12 months.

Nothing in these Terms excludes liability for:

  • Death or personal injury caused by negligence
  • Fraud or fraudulent misrepresentation
  • Any liability that cannot be excluded under applicable law

10. No Professional Advice

Pestify is a software tool.

It does not provide:

  • Legal advice
  • Regulatory advice
  • Pest control services
  • Certification guarantees

Users remain fully responsible for regulatory compliance in their jurisdiction.

11. Termination

We may suspend or terminate access if:

  • You breach these Terms
  • You fail to pay subscription fees
  • Use poses security risks
  • Required by law

You may terminate your account at any time.

Upon termination:

  • Access is revoked
  • Data may be deleted according to the Privacy Policy

12. Third-Party Services

The Platform may integrate third-party services such as:

  • Hosting providers
  • Calendly (demo booking)
  • Infrastructure services

We are not responsible for third-party policies or performance.

13. Confidentiality

Both parties agree to maintain confidentiality of non-public business information.

This obligation survives termination.

14. Force Majeure

We are not liable for failure to perform due to events beyond reasonable control, including:

  • Natural disasters
  • War
  • Government actions
  • Internet failures
  • Power outages

15. Governing Law & Jurisdiction

These Terms are governed by the laws of Greece.

Any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Greece, unless mandatory EU consumer law provides otherwise.

16. Amendments

We may update these Terms.

Updated versions will be published on this page with a revised date.

Continued use constitutes acceptance.

17. Contact

For legal inquiries:

📧 manager@pestify.gr

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.subtitle: This Cookie Policy explains how Pestify (Pest – Free) uses cookies and similar technologies on pestify.gr.
cookies.body:
Pestify is operated by Pest – Free (Owner: Χρήστος Παμπόρης / Christos Pamporis), Greece. For general information about personal data processing, please see our Privacy Policy.

1. Legal Framework

The use of cookies and similar technologies in the European Union is regulated by Article 5(3) of the ePrivacy Directive (as implemented in Greece by Law 3471/2006) and, where personal data is involved, by the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).

Non-essential cookies (e.g., analytics or marketing) are only used with your prior consent.

2. What Are Cookies?

Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. Similar technologies may include local storage (localStorage/sessionStorage), pixels, or technical identifiers.

3. Categories of Technologies Used on pestify.gr

3.1 Strictly Necessary

These are required for the website to function properly and cannot be disabled.

  • pestify_consent – Stores your cookie preferences (duration: 6 months).
  • Technical storage required for security and infrastructure functionality.

These do not require consent under EU law.

3.2 Analytics (only with consent)

If you consent, we may use analytics tools (e.g., Google Analytics 4) to understand how visitors use the website. These tools may collect:

  • Pages visited
  • Device/browser information
  • Approximate location (country level)

Analytics scripts are activated only after consent.

3.3 Marketing (only with consent)

If you consent, marketing technologies (e.g., Google Ads conversion tracking) may be activated to measure advertising effectiveness.

These are loaded only after consent.

3.4 Third-Party Booking (Calendly)

When you request a demo, Calendly may load and may set its own cookies. Calendly is an independent controller for data processed through its booking system.

Calendly is loaded only after you provide the necessary consent or actively request the booking service.

4. Consent Management

You may:

  • Accept all cookies
  • Reject non-essential cookies
  • Customize your preferences

You may withdraw or modify your consent at any time by clicking the “Cookie Settings” link in the footer.

Withdrawing consent does not affect prior lawful processing.

5. How to Control Cookies via Your Browser

You can also manage cookies through your browser settings. Blocking strictly necessary cookies may impact site functionality.

6. Changes to This Policy

We may update this Cookie Policy to reflect changes in technology or legal requirements. Updates will be published on this page.

Questions: manager@pestify.gr

consent.title: Cookies & measurement
consent.description: We use necessary cookies for security. With your consent, we use analytics (Google Analytics 4, Sentry) and marketing cookies (Google Ads conversion tracking) to measure performance and improve the service.
consent.necessary_desc: Required for security and basic functionality.
consent.analytics_desc: Helps us understand usage and fix issues (GA4, Sentry).
consent.marketing_desc: Helps us measure campaigns (Google Ads conversions).
